# seerr_metadata_settings (Resource)

Manage Seerr metadata provider settings via `/api/v1/settings/metadata`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "seerr_metadata_settings" "main" {
  tv    = "tmdb"
  anime = "tvdb"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `anime` (String) Metadata provider for anime metadata. Valid values are `tmdb` and `tvdb`.
- `tv` (String) Metadata provider for TV metadata. Valid values are `tmdb` and `tvdb`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body from the latest read.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import seerr_metadata_settings.main metadata
```
